text: [Today's MV Commentary guests!!]
[Performed an all-kill on 3 Music Shows!!]
[Got7 "Fly" Commentary start!]
MK: Hello, everyone. We should give our group greeting right?
1...2...3! Come and get it! Got7! Hello, we are Got7!
JY: Hello, I'm your one-day MC, Got7's Junior (Jinyoung).

JY: What's your name?
YG: It's Kim Yugyeom.
BB: I'm BamBam.

YG: I'm Choi Youngjae.
MK: I'm Mark.
YG: The atmosphere feels very...

[Got7 who can't adapt to the serious atmosphere]
YJ: It feels kind of like, "However~"

BB: It's a serious feeling.
JY: We came here to do something important, right?

YG: Oh what is it?
BB: Really important?
JY: We are going to watch Got7's "Fly" music video while making comments.

YG: That is so important!
BB: Really important!
JY: Wait a minute. Are you saying that this isn't important?

YG: We said that it is important.
BB: No, it is important but...

YJ: It doesn't look like you think so.
BB: It's just that the atmosphere is too serious.
JY: Since it's so important, can you say "MV Commentary" in perfect English pronunciation?
[Arrogant]

YJ: Can I say it too?
JY: Yes.
[Mu.Jik.Bi.Di.O.Ko.Men.Teo.Ry.]
JY: Firstly, before watching the MV, what kind of album is "Flight Log: Departure"?
JY: Please introduce this album to us.
YG: I will explain. "Fly" is our title song that shows fresh youthfulness.

YG/BB: People in their 20's... 20's...
YJ: Yes, I'm explaining it.

YJ: Yes, people in their 20's.
JY: Wait, stop. Hey maknaes! Stop.
BB: But right now we are at the peak of our "fresh youthfulness"
MK: Hey, if the MC tells you to be quiet, you have to be quiet.
JY: With the authority of MC, stop talking for 10 seconds.

YJ: People in their 20's...
YG: I got it.
[Sigh]
YG: A clear note of youth and a confession of love from people in their 20's are expressed through this song.
YG: Thank you to the composer, Earattack. Got7's "Fly" is such a fun song.
JY: In this album, are there any new charms from Got7?
YJ: I think the synchronized dance is the real charm because so far we have done groovy, JYP-style dances.

JY: It seems like you're saying something that was written out for you.
YJ: No, these are my own thoughts.
YG: Up until we've been shooting stuff in one style so of course he remembers that.
BB: Isn't this the first time we are wearing the same clothes?
No~ No~!
YG/JY/YJ: For "Stop, Stop It" we wore the same clothes.

MK: Excuse me but, could you show some interest in the team?
BB: There were slight differences...
[Let's not fight amongst ourselves~]
JY: Were there any incidents during our first broadcast?
YG: The choreography is quite extreme, sharp and there's a lot of jumping around.

YJ: That's right.
YG: Even after one rehearsal, all the members would be exhausted.

YJ: That's right. The dance was..
YG: Even doing it once is tiring, but because of our fans, we kept working hard until the end.
YJ: After receiving strength from them.
JY: We will now watch our MV together.

YJ: Before that! Jaebum-hyung and Jackson-hyung couldn't be here today but...
JY: Oh, that's right...
YJ: We will work harder to make it feel like they're here.
YG: That side will give off the Jaebum-hyung vibe and our side will give off the Jackson-hyung vibe.

YG: This is accurate right?
JY: And I will give off my own vibes.

YG: Yes.
YJ: That's a good method.
JY: When watching the MV, are there any important scenes that we should look out for?

YG: Wouldn't that be our faces?
JY: That's right.

YG: I'm right? Yay~
YJ: The meaning that is hidden in the choreography and Jinyoung-hyung's acting.

YG: We see a lot of the in the trailer.
BB: And there's also that one thing.
BB: While we were dancing, there were a lot of moments where we would start laughing.
BB: Everyone should watch carefully for these moments.
JY: While we are giving our commentary.

JY: Alright let's watch Got7's "Fly" MV with...
BB: Bowling? Do you remember bowling?
JY: Excuse me! Maknae!
[Please listen to others!! lol]

[We're giving off the Jackson-hyung vibe]
BB: No, I wasn't...
MK/YJ: Jackson isn't even this talkative.
[Forget it]
JY: Now, let's all watch the video together with the members of Got7.
BB: It's not showing up on our screens...
JY: Thankfully.
[Focused]
BB: Oh, we are so in sync.
BB/YJ: Why?
JY: The wind was really strong that day
[How cold was that? Do you remember it?]

YJ: Of course.
BB: But I really liked it because I was getting fairer.

YJ: I danced feeling like I was in Thailand.
JY: To be honest, I miss the "A" MV...

YJ: True!
BB: Me too, really.
MK: But "A" was the exact opposite of this because it was too hot.

YJ: Back then, even if you stood completely still...
BB: Whenever we shoot our music videos, there's never any in between.
BB: It's always too hot or too cold.
JY: This time it really was too cold!
JY: I just wanted to tell everyone how cold it was...

YG: Here!
BB: No, not yet...

YG: It snowed here.
BB: Not in this scene.
JY: Hey, Maknae! Could you hold up the "Stop" sign?
YG: I'm sorry.
BB: So handsome.

JY: Ah, really...Yugyeom's charm is really something.
BB: What did you want to say?
JY: Yugyeom's style is to yell it out first and then take action.
YG: The atmosphere is too serious and I'm working really hard to lighten things up.

YJ: It's not serious at all.
JY: Good, good.

[Cute maknaes bickering <3]
BB: So what did you want to say?
YG: I wanted to say that it started snowing!
MK: But you didn't actually say it.
YJ: Wait, please let Yugyeom talk for one minute.

YG: What I wanted to say was...
JY: Before that, the two of you need to make up.
[We're always like this~]

JY: Just reconcile.
YG: Understood.

YG: At that time, it was almost spring. March... was it March?
BB: Who said so?
JY: Yes, yes.
YG: It was March when the snow started falling at night. I thought it was really pretty.

[Look closely and you can see snow flurries!]
YG: If you watch the night scenes closely, you can slightly see the snow falling.
[That's it]
JY: But really, that day was way too cold.
JY: We didn't expect snow to fall, but it did.

JY: Snow came. Alright, I'll move on.
[Nunbal = "Snow" which was the name of a movie Jinyoung is in]

YG: That was really witty! 
[There was a press conference the other day]
YG: I saw pictures from the event. You looked really good.

[Giving a 3 minute warning..]
JY: I understand.
[I'll move on~]
JY: Ah, this part. BamBam did a gesture during this scene which looked really cool.

BB: Why~?
YG: No, honestly, he looked really cool.

JY: Will you show it to us?
YG: Show it to us once.

JY: I asked BamBam to do it.
BB: No, you can't do it like that. I'll show it to you.
YG: Ready, start~
MK: Let's please move on~
YG: I can see some snow!

JY: Wait a minute.
BB: I saw that.
JY: If you'll look at Youngjae's expression...

YG: Cute~
YJ: Did you see that?
JY: He's so excited.

YG: There are a lot of stories behind this...
BB: Jackson-hyung's hand was removed very quickly.
YJ: Are you going to let me speak?
YJ: There's a story behind this. Jackson-hyung asked me to keep smiling,
YJ: because during broadcasts, cameras wouldn't capture me. So I kept smiling while Jackson-hyung gave me a straight face. I was kind of embarrassed.
YJ: So that was it.

JY: Our team does have a problem with that.
BB: Yugyeom...
JY: We say it, but we never do it till the end.
YJ: We are bad at wrapping things up.

JY: Alright, let's move on.
YG: Yes, please move along.

BB: I didn't do it.
YG: I didn't ask.
[Maknaes who are still bickering]
JY: I really like this part.

BB: Oh, I see the snow.
YG: See! You can see the snow~

YG: I suddenly thought about...
BB: Youngjae-hyung was laughing then...

JY: Wait, BamBam-ssi...
YJ: You were laughing too.
YG: You didn't raise the stop sign~!
MK: Can we remove BamBam?

YJ: We'll raise the stop sign and then remove BamBam.
MK: Please.

MK: Stop! BamBam, get out!
JY: Let's say stop together. 1...2...3!

All: Stop!
BB: Okay, please speak.
YG: At the time we were filming, the weather was really cold right?
YG: However, when the sun was shining down, since the ground was asphalt, it got quite warm.

YG: So when the snow fell...
JY: I almost fell asleep during that.
[Funny]
YJ: Oh, that was filmed well.

JY: This was the dance that was the topic of a lot of conversation.
YJ: That's right.

YJ: "Shoulder gangster dance".
JY: The "shoulder gangster dance" caused Yugyeom's popularity to skyrocket!
JY: And you know how Yugyeom always takes off his jacket like this?
JY: Why do you do that? I'm curious. Every time we shoot MV's...
YG: It's swag.
YJ: Ah, so it's Kim Yugyeom's swag.

JY: Can you show us how to do it now?
[Show with swag vs without swag]
[Broken Yugyeom]

[Without swag he even got the dance move wrong]
YJ: Why is he doing the choreography wrong?
YJ: Stop! You can't do the dance like that.
YG: The legs! Originally the dance steps are in the legs right?
JY: But this isn't a step. Is this a step?
YG: If I just do it normally, it's like this.
YG: Then it becomes like this.

YG: That's how I do it.
JY: As expected... and what does our Dance Genius think about this?

YJ: I feel like it's a little lacking.
JY: Ah... a little lacking?
YG: I'll work harder.

YJ: You have to work on it.
JY: Alright, let's move on.
YJ: Can we watch it again?

JY: Why?
YJ: That was very memorable.
YJ: I wanted to see what move you did again. This is my first time seeing it.
JY: Stop. Why is this the first time you're watching our music video?

YJ: No! Hyung did that...
YG: Right! His gesture was very nice.

YJ: It was very memorable!
JY: Ah, the "thumbs up" pose.
YJ: 1, 2, 3 STOP!

YJ: Look at that body line!
YG: That line is so prominent!

JY: What's my name?
YG/YJ: Junior.

JY: No, my birth name.
YG/YJ: Park Jinyoung.

[His real name is Jinyoung. Same as Hong Jinyoung who is famous for her song 
"Thumbs Up"]
JY: I thought about that song as I danced.
[Gooooooooosebumps!!!!]
BB: He really fell off the roof here.
BB: Yugyeom's running.
[Each of the members are flying one by one]
BB: Jaebum flew while dreaming and BamBam flew while dunking.
BB: What is Mark doing?
YG: You really can't stop talking can you?

BB: What were you doing here?
JY: How was this scene filmed? x2

YG: With a green screen.
BB: Yup.
YJ: This was a CG scene. The roller coaster was... Ah, actually I saw fans say something about this.
YJ: They said, "Youngjae was afraid of roller coasters so he flew to avoid it. Now he's not afraid of them anymore". There were a lot of people who thought this.
BB: We should also create a theory for this part.
YG: Please keep quiet.

JY: Cider! Cider!
(Saying "Cider" is a way to express that the comment that was just made was refreshing like cider)
JY: That was 2016's best cider.

MK: Let's move on to the next part.
JY: Okay.

BB: Usually when one dreams of falling...
YG: He grows taller.

BB: You'll pee... Oh yes, that's right.
YJ: "You'll pee"
[Focused Again]
BB: Where are we going?
BB: Suddenly, Jaebum is flying. Youngjae looks so happy!
BB: Oh! He took off the jacket!
BB: Because of Yugyeom...
JY: In the car just now, there were lots of things that happening during that time.

JY: We were so tired then.
YJ: Right.

[They looked like they were enjoy themselves... but they were actually tired?
JY: That's when I realized I was a professional.

YJ: I could feel it too! That Jinyoung-hyung was a professional.
BB: Let's show them.
YJ: Jinyoung! Filming is starting!
[Automatic Fake Smile]
[Returning to his dreaming after filming]
BB: Mark-hyung also had an interesting story from that time.
MK: I don't know.
[Disregarding BamBam lol]

BB: Didn't Yugyeom have one too?
JY: Cider! Cider!

YG: Very much like a pro...
YJ: There are 2 Ciders here.
BB: Jinyoung-hyung is falling by himself.

BB: How was that tear created?
YG: When I saw this for the first time, I was amazed and touched at the same time.
YJ: I was with him when he filmed this scene.

BB: Was it fascinating?
YJ: It was quick, he cried very quickly.
JY: There was a pole and I leaned on it, "Cry!".
JY: "Huh?"

JY: They asked me to cry.
YG: A pole?
JY: Yes, after leaning my head on a pole, I just let a tear fall.
JY: After a close up shot of that, they flipped it upside down.
BB/YG: That's really amazing.
BB: Wow, indeed Actor Park. You can even control you tears!

YJ: Honestly, it was very cool.
BB: Everyone, go watch "Nunbal" a lot!

MK: BamBam...
YJ: What do you think about that, Mark?

[BamBam being disregarded the entire day lol]
MK: BamBam...

BB: Ah, why is it always me!? I was just talking about this!
[BamBam is so cute lol]
YG: He's starting to get a little bit angry.
BB: Let's move on.
JY: This is so fun because of BamBam.
BB: All of a sudden... He wakes up.
JY: Just like that, one person went away.

YG: Went where?
BB: Home.
YJ: When he arrived...
JY: From your point of view, what do you think this ending means?
YG: For me... It means that hyung died alone? If it's not that then you must have just been dreaming.
YJ: Yes, that's what I thought too. I thought that everything was a dream and in the dream he thought he died.

MK: Do you know that movie? The movie where they went into their dreams?
JY: "Inception"?
MK: In that...

BB: (Singing "Thumbs Up" by Hong Jinyoung)
MK: During the last scene of that movie...

JY: Wait, stop.
YG: Why would you sing that all of a sudden?

BB: I suddenly thought about it.
JY: The oldest hyung is speaking.
MK: The last scene of that movie was a dream within a dream within a dream in another dream.
MK: He's in about 5 dreams and one by one, he gets out of the dream and woke up on the bed at last.

BB: In those dreams there was another dream!
YG: I said that too!
YG: Whether it was a dream or a reality, is unknown!
JY: I interpreted it this way: With the exception of me, all of the other members died.
BB: But why did you open your eyes in the end?
JY: They told me too!!
YJ: It wasn't up to Jinyoung-hyung.
JY: So, for now, our MV Commentary has ended.

BB: No it hasn't. We have to keep going a little longer.
JY: It's because the MV has ended.
YJ: Please don't fart.
MK: It's because Yugyeom is wearing a leather jacket. The noise comes from his jacket rubbing against the chair.

BB: No, it hasn't ended yet. Jinyoung-hyung, can you continue to play it a little more?
YG: I thought it was a real fart sound.
BB: Our title is "Flight Log: Departure".
BB: We should do some album promotion!
JY: Firstly, I really liked this because we were able to analyze this MV from every angle.
BB: That was our main objective.
JY/YG: That's right.
BB: People have different ways of seeing things and thinking of things.
JY: So we've finished watching the MV and I wonder  if we have answered some of our fans questions.
JY: In my opinion, this time around, BamBam looked especially cool.

YG: Yeah, you're right.
BB: That was so out of the blue.
JY: This... "Chak chak chak!" move... I still remember it well!

BB: Was it really memorable?
YJ: It was the most memorable scene.

BB: Really?
YJ: Really! It's not a lie.

BB: I really didn't know...
YJ: Honestly, the compliments for BamBam before were just lies, but this one is not.
[Acknowledged by the members: BamBam's cool "Chak Chak Chak!"
JY: Everyone, so what are Got7's plans for 2016?
MK: Our promotion will continue until April.

YG: We'll be having concerts!
MK: After we hold on concerts, we will be going overseas as well.
MK: And when we come back, there will probably be 1 more album coming out...?
BB: Could you please organize your words before you speak...?

YG: Why? He's doing fine.
JY: He's doing fine though.
MK: I'm doing fine, what are you talking about?
YG: Later you're going to be hit by Mark-hyung.
JY: Youngjae, when is our concert?
YJ: Our concert will be the 29th and 30th of April at the SK Olympic Handball Gymnasium.

YG: Wow, so accurate!
JY: You're practically a machine.
YJ: 8pm on the 29th and 4pm on the 30th.

YG: It's 4pm on the 30th?
YJ: Yes! It's a Saturday.
YJ: We'll be starting it early so people can go out and have fun afterwards.

YG: Being considerate!
YJ: Yes, we're being considerate.
JY: That's good.

JY: How was it today?
BB: Good.

MK: Today was a little...
JY: Today was tiring cause of BamBam.

MK: Because of BamBam it was a little..
YJ: A tiring day?
YG: Mark-hyung seemed to be burning with anger inside because of BamBam.

YJ: Deep inside.
BB: Do you know what style I am?

BB: I'm peace style.
(He is trying to make a word play with peace and pigonhan, which means tiring, style)

BB: Tiring (pigohan) style.
YJ: Let's just end this quickly.
YG: Tiring style? Oh...
JY: The audience is probably wondering why BamBam is talking about "peace style".
JY: Everyone, please watch over Got7's activities, watch our MV more and listen to "Fly" even more.

YG: Should we say goodbye?
JY: Yes.

MK: This has been...
ALL: Got7! Thank you!
[Continue to fly! Become the Got7 that flies up high!!!]
